      class ExpiringHashMap extends ConcurrentHashMap<K,ExpiringHashMap.Entry<V>> implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • cleanupIntervalMs
          long cleanupIntervalMs
          The interval between cleanup operations in milliseconds
        • expirationTimeMs
          long expirationTimeMs
          The expiration time for entries in milliseconds

          The timestamp of the last cleanup operation
